diagnosing-bugs.adaptationNote: Keeps the upstream diagnosis loop, but narrows invocation to explicit GAM diagnosis-mode requests and uses Developer terminology for the person interacting with agents.

grilling.adaptationNote: Lightly adapted from upstream: uses Developer terminology and simplifies codebase lookup guidance while preserving the one-question-at-a-time grilling workflow.

gam-handoff.reason: Rewritten into a GAM-specific chat handoff workflow with Agent P/T/D/R handoff types, chat output, and repository source-of-truth rules.

gam-grill.reason: Rewritten as a GAM-specific coordinator for $grilling, $gam-domain-modeling, and $gam-requirements instead of the upstream generic docs workflow.
